title: buffer overflow detected
body:
Steps to reproduce;
 1. Compile iverilog from commit `s20150603-770-g351a4e5f` with libfortify.
 2. Try to run iverilog on the following file;
    ```verilog
    module main;
      initial
        begin
          $display("Hello, World");
          $finish ;
        end
    endmodule
    ```
 3. Get a segfault.

Looks like this started happening between `s20150603_0738_g16e8563c` `s20150603_0761_g7feb26ff`?

See log output below;

